hooks.command: echo '🧠 DYSA ECOSYSTEM ENGINE v3.0 — Scanning project...' && if [ -f .claude/PROJECT_PROFILE.json ]; then echo '✅ Project profile found:' && python3 -c "import json; p=json.load(open('.claude/PROJECT_PROFILE.json')); print(f'  Domain: {p.get(\"blueprint\",p.get(\"domain\",\"unknown\"))} | Skills: {len(p.get(\"activated_skills\",[]))} | MCPs: {len(p.get(\"installed_mcps\",[]))} | Agents: {len(p.get(\"agents\",[]))}')" 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️ Profile exists but could not be read'; else echo '🆕 No project profile found — FULL ECOSYSTEM SCAN REQUIRED'; echo '   → Read .claude/skills/project-intelligence/SKILL.md and run detection pipeline'; fi
echo '✅ File modification — auto-verify protocol active'

EDITED_FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$EDITED_FILE" | grep -qE '\.py$'; then python3 -m py_compile "$EDITED_FILE" 2>&1 && echo '✅ Python syntax OK' || echo '❌ Python syntax error — fix immediately'; elif echo "$EDITED_FILE" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|jsx?)$'; then echo '⚡ TypeScript/JSX edited — verify with build'; elif echo "$EDITED_FILE" | grep -qE '\.(html|css|scss)$'; then echo '🎨 Frontend asset edited — verify rendering'; fi
